Have you tried increasing the timing repair margins:
```

GRT_RESIZER_SETUP_SLACK_MARGIN: 0.1
GRT_RESIZER_HOLD_SLACK_MARGIN: 0.15
PL_RESIZER_HOLD_SLACK_MARGIN: 0.15
```
